info.title: Hermes Web UI API
info.description: BFF server API for Hermes Web UI — chat sessions, scheduled jobs, platform channels, model management, skills, memory, logs, file browser, group chat, and terminal.

get.description: Fetches models from all credential pool endpoints in ~/.hermes/auth.json. Supports non-v1 API versions (e.g. /v4).

post.summary: Start Nous Portal OAuth device flow

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Relative path under skills directory (e.g. category/skill/SKILL.md)

put.description: Stops gateway, switches profile, then restarts gateway. Supports WSL and Windows.

get.description:
Upgrade to WebSocket for interactive shell sessions via node-pty. Pass `?token=<auth_token>` if auth is enabled.

**Client → Server messages:**
- Raw text: input to active PTY session
- `{ type: 'create', shell?: string }`: spawn new shell session
- `{ type: 'switch', sessionId: string }`: switch to existing session
- `{ type: 'close', sessionId: string }`: close a session
- `{ type: 'resize', cols: number, rows: number }`: resize active session

**Server → Client messages:**
- Raw binary: PTY output for active session
- `{ type: 'created', id, pid, shell }`: session spawned
- `{ type: 'switched', id }`: session switched
- `{ type: 'exited', id, exitCode }`: session terminated
- `{ type: 'error', message }`: error occurred

post.description: Receives webhook callbacks from Hermes Agent. No signature verification yet.
